titleStmt.title: SII 10.348: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 348. (A.R. No. 745 of 1920.) ON A PILLAR IN THE MAṆḌAPA OF THE TEMPLE OF SŌMĒŚVARA, JUTTIGA, TANUKU TALUK, WEST GODAVARI DISTRICT. Ś. 1177.

summary.p: States that Bhaṇḍāru Koṇḍa-Nāyaka and his son Vīrabhadra-Nāyaka built a karavālabhairava-maṇḍapa in the temple of Vāsuki Ravi Sōmēśvara of Duttika and gave some money also. The statement about payment of money is not clear. The recital that the year was 1177th year of Vishṇuvardhana-Mahārāja is meaningless.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti sa¨rvvalōkāśraya śrīvi
ṣṇuva¨rddhanamahārājula pra
va¨rddhamānavijayarājyasaṁ
vatsaraṁbulu 1177 nēṁṭi
yuttarāyananimityamuna
ḍuttika vāsuki ravi śrīsō
mēsvaramahādēvaraku ma
hādēvasakrava¨rttiki dha¨rmmu
vuga yeṟuva kommināyaku
manmulu bhaṁḍāri koṁḍapanā
yakuṁḍu vīri koḍuku vīra
bhadranāyakuṁḍunu vīriye
ttiṁccina karavālabhairavamaṁḍa
pamunu Umāsahitamunu pa
danaluvu māḍala paṭṭalu Īdha¨rmmuvu
sthānāpatulunu śrīkaraṇakōmanape
ggaḍayunu sānimunnū¨rvvurunu samasta
nibaṁdhakāṁḍrunuṁ dha¨rmmuvu naḍapaṁ
galavāru Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamu
gānu
Digital edition of SII 10.348 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
